message: GitHub repository jonaslgtm/gesp-exam-questions exposes a recursive tree with C++ sample PDFs, C++ past-exam PDFs and C++ solution PDFs alongside Python and graphical content.
GitHub path titles use plus signs as separators; title cleanup must preserve C++ while replacing separator plus signs.
OJ ingestion produced 345 entries including 106 GitHub C++ reference entries and 44 duplicate candidates after OJ-ID title normalization.
